prompt: create a landing page for a PR agency with black background and deep blue as UI color
prompt_refined: Generate a web landing page hero section. The design is for a Public Relations agency. The primary background color is black, with all user interface elements (buttons, navigation links, highlighted text, accents) rendered in a deep blue. Include a clear, professional headline, a brief sub-headline, and a prominent call-to-action button, all centrally positioned on the page. The overall aesthetic should be sleek and corporate.
objects: Prominent call-to-action button, deep blue, centrally positioned
